title: 证券交易 — 市场操守 / Market Conduct (SFA)
summary: SFA 禁止内幕交易、虚假交易与市场操纵、散布虚假/误导信息;代表不得参与,违者负民事/刑事责任。 / The SFA prohibits insider trading, false trading and market manipulation, and dissemination of false/misleading information; representatives must not engage, on pain of civil/criminal liability.

sections.heading: 内幕交易
sections.body: 持有"未普遍公开且若公开将对价格/价值有重大影响"的信息买卖证券,或泄露给他人交易,属违法。

sections.heading: Insider trading
sections.body: Trading while holding information not generally available that, if available, would have a material effect on price/value — or passing it on — is unlawful.

sections.heading: 操纵与虚假信息
sections.body: 制造活跃交易/价格的虚假表象(操纵),或散布影响价格的虚假/误导信息,均被禁止。

sections.heading: Manipulation & false info
sections.body: Creating a false appearance of active trading/price (manipulation), or spreading false/misleading price-sensitive information, are prohibited.

keyPoints: 禁内幕交易(未普遍公开+若公开会对价格/价值有重大影响) / No insider trading (not generally available + material effect on price/value)
禁虚假交易/操纵 / No false trading/manipulation
禁散布虚假误导信息 / No false/misleading information
sourceRef: Securities and Futures Act — Market Conduct
